name: All Things Skratch 550ml Tacx Bottle
description_html:
The Bottle That Knows the Assignment

Meet the Skratch Labs Tacx Daiya Bottle.

It squeezes easy, flows fast, and doesn’t fight you when you’re trying to grab a sip mid-climb. Exactly how a bike bottle needs to be. Wrapped in a playful collage of Skratch icons from espresso makers to heart rate graphs, it’s basically a tiny tribute to the things that power a good day.
• High-flow sport cap
• Easy squeeze body
• Fits standard bottle cages
• 500ml capacity

name: Anti-Hanger-Snack-Saver Grocery Bag
description_html:
Fill ‘er up!

 

Introducing our new reusable grocery bag - the perfect way to tote your groceries and most importantly your snacks!



This bag isn't just any old boring tote - it's made from super sturdy, eco-friendly material that can hold even the heaviest loads of groceries, event gear and all your favorite munchies. Because let's be real, snacks are the #1 essential. You don't want to be caught without some emergency Skratch bars or chews when you're on the go.

 

 

Tech Specs / Features:

 

  • “Fill to line with snacks” design accent
  • Crafted using three recycled plastic bottles, this eco-chic reusable bag makes a big difference to the environment. When you invest in these bags, you are helping to reduce plastic bottle waste in landfills and you’re also doing your bit for energy efficiency (up to ⅔ less energy is needed to manufacture items using RPET).
  • Spacious Main Compartment and Ample Gussets
  • 23.5” Shoulder Straps for Easy Carrying
  • CPSIA-Compliant; Child-Friendly
  • 13" W x 15" H x 8" D

name: DIY: Gel Making Kit
description_html:
Here are a few ways to tinker with our products to either create a gel if that is your preferred fuel source or a concentrated bottle for something like an Ironman when the aid station might not have your preferred nutrition, you don't want to open packets etc.



For a gel-like option you can use .5 scoop per every 1 ounce of water.

As a starting point, add 2 scoops to an empty, dry bottle, partially fill with 4-5 oz of water, shake well, and then add 4-5 oz more water and shake again. For better mixing, let it sit for 15 minutes before use.

One serving gives you up to 50g of carbohydrates, plus the electrolytes lost in sweat, to fuel and hydrate your big efforts. Use more or less mix per bottle depending on your carb needs.

You can always start with less and add more as needed, based on your caloric and electrolyte needs.You can mix High-Carb with our other hydration mixes into one bottle but you’ll want to do some math and make sure you are getting an appropriate combination of carbs, sodium, and liquid to your needs and to avoid GI distress (too many carbs in too short of a period and you’ll be busting your gut…). This ratio can change depending on the weather, effort, and other factors, so test things in training and if you have questions, hit us up: info@skratchlabs.com

-You can refrigerate but we do not recommend freezing.

For the complete guide click here.

name: Electrolyte Booster
description_html: Our Electrolyte Booster delivers customizable electrolyte support without any added sweeteners, flavors, or salty taste.  It mixes easily into your drink to boost your sodium, but not your flavor or carb intake.  Designed to work seamlessly with any hydration or fueling strategy, it lets you dial in exactly what your body needs—nothing more, nothing less—so you can stay hydrated and perform at your best.

name: Embroidered Patches
description_html:
patch up your style

 

High quality custom embroidered patch great for clothing and bags. From denim to cotton and canvas, personalize your gear in style. 

  • Custom embroidered patch on twill
  • Iron-on backing
  • Hot cut border
  • Measurements: 1.25" W X 4" L
  • Available colors: black, white

 

 

application:

 

  1. Get the essentials ready.
  2. Iron the surface - it will make the item warm and smooth.
  3. Place the patch - find the place you like the most.
  4. Cover it with cloth - this way you won't burn the patch.
  5. Iron with pressure - make 3-4 rounds of ironing. Press down the iron and apply pressure.
  6. Let it cool - this is when the glue really seals the patch and fabric.
  7. Represent Skratch in style!

 

Nylon, Polyester, and cordura will likely melt in high temperatures or a patch won't adhere. Use fabric glue or all-purpose contact cement or sew the edges for a permanent secure adornment.

name: Energy Bar Sport Fuel
description_html: Energy Bars bring convenience to real food snacks and are designed as a fuel source for when you need it most. We make our energy bars from scratch with fruit, nuts, nut butters, and quinoa for a nutrition profile that’s suitable for a snack anytime you’re hungry or during prolonged activity.

name: Energy Chews Sport Fuel
description_html: Energy Chews are an easy and convenient source of carbohydrate to help maintain blood sugar and performance during hard and long workouts. We use slightly more water for an improved texture that makes them easier to chew and only real fruit for flavor, for a clean, natural, and incredible taste. It’s like a gumdrop that’s actually a delicious high-performance fruit-drop.

name: Everyday Training Bundle
description_html: Your daily training trifecta: Hydration Sport Drink Mix, Energy Chews, and Recovery Sport Drink Mix. This bundle supports you from first sip to last rep to post-workout recovery, so you can show up ready again tomorrow.

name: Feed Zone Portables
description_html:
on-the-go food for athletes

 

When Dr. Allen Lim left the lab to work with pro cyclists, he found athletes weary of processed bars and gels and the same old pasta. So Lim joined professional chef Biju Thomas to make eating delicious and practical. Their groundbreaking Feed Zone Cookbook brought the favorite recipes of the pros to everyday athletes.

 

It's not often that a sequel turns out as good as the original (Remember Ghostbusters 2? Neither do we.) But the new Feed Zone Portables Cookbook may just be the rare exception to that rule.

 

In their new cookbook Feed Zone Portables, Chef Biju and Dr. Lim offer 75 all-new and ALL PORTABLE food recipes for cyclists, runners, triathletes, mountain bikers, climbers, hikers, and backpackers. Each real food recipe is simple, delicious, easy to make—and ready to go on your next ride, run, climb, or hike.

 

Feed Zone Portables keeps all the most popular features of The Feed Zone Cookbook including quick and easy recipes for athletes, beautiful full-color photographs of every dish, complete nutrition data, tips on why these are the best foods for athletes, and time-saving ways on how to cook real food every day.

 

Try out new rice cakes, two-bite pies, griddle cakes, waffles, baked eggs, sticky bites, rice balls, paninis, cakes, and cookies. Wherever you go, these real foods can easily come with you and will nourish your best performance.

name: Feed Zone Table
description_html:
family-style meals to nourish life and sport

 

Join us for dinner! Chef Biju Thomas and Dr. Allen Lim have returned to the kitchen to champion the most social meal of the day. In their new cookbook Feed Zone Table, Biju and Allen offer 100 all-new dinner recipes to bring friends and family to the table. 

 

"Chef Biju and I wrote the Feed Zone Cookbook and Feed Zone Portables for anyone interested in improving athletic performance. So when we heard that people who don’t necessarily consider themselves athletes were using our cookbooks because they wanted simple, healthy recipes to share with their friends and family, we were pleasantly surprised . . . and inspired.

 

For us, neither sports nor nutrition is solely about performance. The reality is that we value activity and food not just because we want to perform better but also because both have this amazing ability to bring people together, to give us pleasure, and to feed our souls." ~ Dr. Allen Lim

name: Hydrapak Softflasks 250ml
description_html:
The ultra-light hydration sidekick for your adventures – the Skratch Labs Hydrapak Softflask 250ml.

The Shortie is sized just right for your jersey pocket

The Tall is sized just right for your running vest pocket.

Let’s dive into why you need this in your life.

 

 

Pocket Perfect

 

Ever tried stuffing a hard bottle into your jersey pocket? Yeah, not fun. Our 250ml Softflask is like the Goldilocks of hydration – not too big, not too small, just right. It fits snugly in your jersey without that awkward bulge, so you can ride like the wind.

 

 

Lightweight & Squeezable

 

No one wants to carry extra weight on a climb. The Softflask is feather-light and super squeezable, making it a breeze to hydrate on the go. 

 

 

SHORTIE: Bite Valve Cap

 

With the shortie size High-flow bite valve which auto-seals after each sip and includes a twist locking cap for added security.

 

TALL: Silicon Flip Cap

 

With the tall size, when you're pushing hard, you need hydration fast. Open valve delivers a generous gulp with each squeeze. Seal it in and keep dirt out by popping the cap back down. 

 

 

 

Easy to See and Clean

 

Hydration gear that’s a pain to clean or hard to tell if it's got something growing in it? No, thank you. Just pop it in the dishwasher or give it a quick hand wash. 

 

 

Durability Meets Flexibility

 

Crafted from ultra-durable TPU, this flask can take a beating and still bounce back for more. Flexibility meets toughness – just like you.

 

 

Keep It Cool

 

Want your drink to stay cool? Fill it, freeze it, and enjoy icy-cold sips on your ride. Trust us, your taste buds will thank you. PS. We don’t recommend freezing a highly concentrated flask of High-Carb Drink Mix - normal ratio or our other mixes are fine.

 

 

Tech Specs:

  • Volume: 250ml
  • Blaster Sheath Z-PT-P165
  • 2025 - 28mm Softask Through Cap - 424C
  • Dishwasher safe
  • BPA and PVC-free

name: Hydration + Fuel Starter Bundle
description_html: Hydrate, then add carbs you can actually digest. This bundle pairs Hydration Sport Drink Mix with Energy Chews so you can start building a simple, reliable fueling routine for longer workouts.

Who doesn't want a handful of Skratch stickers?  Why not add this to your order and get yourself five, count 'em one - two - three - four - FIVE Skratch Labs stickers?

description_html: Timing is everything when it comes to recovery. So, when athletes need something convenient to eat and drink immediately after they’ve emptied the tank, our Recovery Sport Drink Mix is an easy choice. It provides the carbs, protein, electrolytes, and taste needed to rapidly refuel, rehydrate, and rebuild after long and hard endurance workouts.

name: Skratch HydraPak 500mL SkyFlask™
description_html:
Grab and run for miles!

 

Runners have been asking us for an easy way to bring Skratch with them, and we're delivering with the best dang soft flask on the market. The Skratch HydraPak SkyFlask™ 500mL handheld is lightweight, compact, and easy to hold with an adjustable hand strap for comfort. It has a twist locking cap, a high-flow bite valve, and a large opening. We’ve put this soft flask through the wringer — filled with Super High-Carb Sport Drink Mix on long trail runs and love the freedom of not having to wear a water bottle and still getting all the carbs we need.

 

 

Features

 

  • Adjustable hand strap — adjustable strap cinches down to fit different hand sizes.
  • Compressible — soft design shrinks as you drink, reducing water movement and stores in your pocket when empty.
  • Locking cap — Leak Proof, twist-locking cap for spill-free transport
  • BPA-free & PVC-free
  • Freezable

name: Skratch Labs 22oz Specialized Bottle
description_html:
Art meets speed meets hydration.

 

Our new 22oz bottle is a visual punch of retro-futuristic grit, bold movement, and high-octane color that makes your old bottle feel like a snooze.

 

 

What’s on it?

 

  • A warped, kinetic grid of speed-coded color and pattern inspired by Skratch Labs Racing—because straight lines are for people who don't corner hard.
  • High-contrast halftones that nod to pop art and power meters (we contain multitudes) and Skratch OG pixels.
  • And of course our logo so people know you only fuel with the best.

 

What’s it for?

 

  • Drinking out of, duh.
  • Giving your bottle cage a little more main character energy.
  • Making sure the only thing more eye-catching than your watts is your gear.
  • It’s a 22oz Specialized Purist, so the bottle tech is dialed—no taste, no funk, all flow.
  • Just add water (and Skratch).

 

 

Tech Specs:

 

  • Purist infusion shields the bottle from odor, stains, and mold to keep your water pure and your bottle clean.
  • Large screw top design is leak-free and wide enough for ice cubes and scooping in powdered drink mix.
  • Updated MoFlo cap retains the same mechanism and delivers great flow. It's now easier to clean with a flush top and improved grip. 100% leak-free.
  • Made from easy-to-squeeze LDPE material.
  • Clear viewing strip makes it easy to see the bottle's contents.
  • BPA-Free plastic is made from 100% FDA food-grade materials, and it's printed with non-solvent base (UV Cured), CPSC-approved ink and materials

name: Skratch Labs Black Logo Tee
description_html:
We’ve scoured the earth for the comfiest t-shirt...

 

And we found one we like so much, we put our name on it. The Bella + Canvas Tri-Blend is 50% polyester, 25% ring-spun cotton, and 25% rayon, for a tee that is lightweight, crazy soft, and surprisingly durable. It has a modern fit, oh, and it has two sleeves and a neck hole. Show your Skratch pride and be comfortable. 

All sizing is unisex sizing:

name: Skratch Labs Sample Pack
description_html:
The perfect way to dip your toes into the Skratch universe—or help someone else start strong.

Our Sample Pack brings together fan favorites across hydration, fueling and recovery, with formats designed for real performance and real stomachs. Whether you're training for a big goal or just getting started, this kit gives you everything you need to feel the difference that real ingredients make. No artificial nonsense. No gut bombs. So you can taste real performance.

name: Skratch Labs Tempo Bottle
description_html:
For the run. For the rhythm. For the personal bests.

 

Meet the bottle that keeps up with your stride. The Skratch Labs Tempo is made for runners who want fast hydration without the fumble. No clunk—just a smooth, squeeze-and-go design that feels like it was built for your hand (because it was).

 

 

What makes it different?

 

  • A narrower, hand-held profile that ditches the bulk and fits right into your natural grip.
  • Soft-squeeze body with a high-flow sport cap that gives you quick hits of hydration without breaking pace.
  • Subtle Skratch Labs branding with our mantra: Taste. Real. Performance. 

 

 

What’s it for?

 

  • Mid-run sips that don’t slow you down.
  • Training blocks, tempo runs, and race day rituals.
  • Runners who take hydration seriously—but still want their gear to look good.

 

*NOTE - these bottles are narrower in design than a standard bike bottle.  They will NOT fit in bicycle water bottle cages. They are meant to be held in hand.

 

 

  • BPA And PVC Free
  • Easy To Clean
  • Effortless Squeeze
  • Leakproof

name: Skratch Labs x Bivo Bottle
description_html:
This is not your average water bottle. This is liquid delivery technology engineered for people who sweat on purpose.

We teamed up with the brains at Bivo to bring you a metal bottle that flows like a plastic one, minus the weird tastes, spills, or single-use guilt. Made from food-grade stainless steel, the Skratch Labs Bivo One delivers a smooth, pressureless flow—so you don’t have to launch your bottle at your face mid-ride just to get a sip.

Plus the Skratch badge to show you fuel with the best.

Why You'll Actually Love It:
  • No-Squeeze Flow – Gravity-powered pour = effortless sipping at full send.
  • No Plastic Taste 
  • BPA/BPS-free
  • Dishwasher Safe 
  • Grippy Matte Finish 
  • Designed by Pros – Every detail was obsessed over, from the flow rate to the no-rattle nozzle.

name: Skratch Musette Bag
description_html:
Equal parts iconic and everyday essential, the Skratch Labs Musette is our take on the classic cyclist’s carryall—built for real-life mileage, not just race-day nostalgia.

 

 

Why You’ll Love It:

 

  • It’s practical. Fits bottles, snacks, ride fuel, spare layers, or groceries—take your pick.

  • It’s iconic. A nod to cycling heritage, reimagined for modern sport and everyday life.

  • It’s unmistakably Skratch. Repping the name you trust for real ingredients and real performance.

 

Whether you’re pedaling, traveling, spectating, or just living your sweaty little heart out—this bag’s down to go with you.

 

Carry it with pride.
Taste. Real. Performance. Everywhere you go.

name: Skratch Paper 2.0
description_html:
We've reengineered Skratch Paper and are excited to announce the launch of Skratch Paper 2.0! New improvement includes a food safe silicone to make it completely waterproof and oven safe! 

 

Skratch Paper has the strength of parchment paper and the shape-holding qualities of aluminum foil. It’s perfect for wrapping and protecting food while still being easy to open when you’re on the go (Pro tip: It is also fitting for grilling or using for cake and muffin molds so you can pull right out of the pan -No sticking and no additional greasing)

 

Replaces the task of finding parchment rolls and cutting paper to single-use sizes. One package contains 40 pre-cut 8.5" x 8.5" easy-to-use sheets with complete wrapping instructions.



Use this to wrap all your rice cakes and fresh portables! Need portable ideas? We wrote the book on them! Click here to view cookbook

 

Specs:

 

*Heat resistance for temperatures up to 400 F/220 ° C

name: Skratch Women's Cycling Jersey
description_html:
Skratch Labs x Assos Women's Cycling Jersey - where style meets performance in one sleek package.

 

 

🔥 Streamlined Fit: Cut for speed, without cutting off your ability to breathe, because let’s be real… some of the jerseys out there do be like that. Our jersey hugs your body just right for aerodynamic prowess without sacrificing comfort.

 

💨 Breathable Fabric: Stay cool under pressure. Our jersey's fabric lets air flow freely, so you can push your limits without overheating.

 

🚀 Smooth Sleeves: No more friction, no more distractions. Raw-cut sleeves glide over your skin, reducing irritation and letting you focus on the ride.

 

⚡Exclusive Design: Our custom Skratch Labs design sets you apart from the pack.

 

 

  • Streamlined fit, breathable, and frictionless raw-cut sleeves
  • 73%PL 15%PA 12%EA All textiles are UPF 50+
  • Big Dual, a lightweight interlock circular knit with fast-drying breathability and odorControl technology.
  • The pockets are stabilized with Sens Strong, a breathable warp knit with micro honeycomb construction.
  • Cut in Assos streamlined regularFit for total comfort on long rides.
  • Race inspired construction that eliminates transitional ridges for clean lines and aerodynamics.
  • Triple Ramp Pockets: flexible fabric panels create “lids,” securing and stabilizing pocket contents.
  • Reflective: detail below the pockets increases visibility in low-light conditions.

description_html:

These are Defeet Socks, learn more about them here

name: Super High-Carb Sport Drink Mix
description_html: Super High-Carb Sport Drink Mix is designed to solve a prevalent problem for endurance athletes: fueling for big days of training or racing when preparing or carrying real food isn’t possible. Super High-Carb is powered by Cluster Dextrin™, a highly-complex carbohydrate that digests easily and steadily, like real food. One serving of Super High-Carb provides ~50g of carbohydrates and 200 calories of energy.

name: Sweat Test
description_html:
Note: Sweat testing is done at Skratch Labs HQ, in Boulder, Colorado. After your purchase, keep an eye on your inbox! We'll follow up via email with a link to schedule your sweat test at a time that works for you. If you are unable to sign up for an available time Monday-Wednesday during business hours, please reach out to athletecare@skratchlabs.com. Please be advised, due to high demand, our earliest availability tends to be four weeks out. If you book a spot, we kindly ask that you commit to your scheduled time. If something unavoidable comes up, please give us as much notice as possible.

 

 

Why Sweat Testing?

 

Sweat is not just water and not everyone's sweat is the same. Sweat also contains electrolytes and the one most prevalent in sweat and most impactful to stay on top of is sodium. Sodium is a critical electrolyte for maintaining hydration, keeping muscles firing, and supporting brain function and blood volume. Here’s the catch: everyone’s sodium loss is different. Some people lose as little as 200 mg/L, while others lose up to 2000 mg/L. By testing your sodium loss, you’ll get the insights you need to fine-tune your hydration and stay at the top of your game.

 

 

Why Get Your Sweat Tested?

 

Understanding your sodium loss means you can tailor a hydration strategy that works for you. Here’s how to know if sweat testing could benefit you:

    • You struggle in hot conditions or experience performance drops in heat

    • You see white, salty marks on your skin or gear after a workout

    • You deal with cramps or GI issues during long races, especially later on

    • You crave salty snacks mid-workout

    • You’re a high-sweater, with soaked clothes or significant weight loss after training

 

 

What’s the Process Like?

 

No workout required—this is all about sweat science, not breaking a sweat. Here’s what to expect:

  1. Sweat Activation (Pilocarpine Iontophoresis): We perform a test to get your forearm sweating—no pain, just a bit of science magic to stimulate sweat production in about 5 minutes.
  2. Sweat Collection: We gather a sample of your sweat via a patch strapped to your arm. This takes about 5–20 minutes.
  3. Sample Analysis: There’s a blue dye in the sweat collector so we can clearly see your sample. If you notice a needle, don’t worry—it’s just used to help move your sample through the tubing for analysis.We’ll push your sweat through the sweat analyzer, run a quick calculation, and boom- you’ll have your sweat sodium concentration
  4. Hydration Plan: With your sweat sodium concentration, we will discuss how to put it into practice with discussion around pre-, during- and post- training and race day. 

 

 

What to Expect

 

After your purchase, keep an eye on your inbox! We'll follow up via email with a link to schedule your sweat test at a time that works for you. Plan to hang with us for about 30–45 minutes. While our test stimulates a small patch on your arm, you’ll get to chat with our performance dietitian about your unique hydration needs. After we get your sodium results, we’ll work with you to build a hydration plan for your next race or training cycle.

 

*Note: Unless otherwise agreed to, all sweat testing will take place at our Headquarters in Boulder, CO.

 

 

Follow-Up and Fine-Tuning

 

We will follow up via email with your sweat sodium test results, but your sweat test is just the start. With a personalized hydration strategy in place, we’re here to help you keep optimizing. As you train and adapt, we can revisit your plan to keep you fueled, hydrated, and ready for whatever’s next.

name: Taste Real Performance Longsleeve
description_html:
Performance starts with what you put in—and what you put on.

 

The Taste Real Performance Tee is your go-to long sleeve for early rides, post-run hangs, or whatever recovery looks like for you. It’s soft, breathable, and built for comfort—repping Skratch’s core belief that real food (and real effort) always wins.

 

  • Super soft cotton blend

  • Classic fit, unisex sizing

  • Perfect for warm-ups, cool-downs, and casual days

  • Features our “Taste Real Performance” mantra

 

Throw it on after a hard session—because real performance doesn’t end at the finish line.

name: Temporary Tattoo
description_html:
pain is temporary, and so are these tattoos

 

Not ready to take the plunge and get a permanent Skratch tattoo? Don't worry, we know you're still tough enough to handle it. If you're hitting up a race and want to show the competition what's hydrating and fueling you through the finish line - these tattoos are the perfect size for showing off your ripped muscles.

 

Usage instructions: Apply, race your heart out, sweat it off, and repeat!

name: The Feed Zone Cookbook
description_html:
A no-fuss guide to preparing good food that will change the way endurance athletes eat.

 

Eat like the pros. Feed Zone meals are the perfect balance of science and practice from Dr. Allen Lim and Chef Biju Thomas. With refreshingly simple ingredients that measure up to the demands of training and racing, these recipes are easy to follow and big on flavor. The tantalizing mix of salty, sweet, and savory satisfies an athlete's cravings and prepares the body for top performance.

 

When Dr. Allen Lim left the lab to work with pro cyclists, he found a peloton weary of food. The sport's elite athletes were underperforming on bland fare and processed bars and gels. So Lim set out to make eating delicious and practical. His journey took him inside the kitchens of Tour de France and delivered him to a dinner party where he met celebrated chef Biju Thomas.

 

Chef Biju and Dr. Lim vetted countless meals with the world's best endurance athletes. Now they share their energy-packed, wholesome recipes to make your meals easy to prepare, delicious to eat, and better for your performance.

name: Unsweetened Hydration Sport Drink Mix
description_html: Our Unsweetened Hydration Sport Drink Mix (formerly Everyday Drink Mix) is made with simple, functional ingredients—electrolytes and a squeeze of real fruit. It delivers the same electrolyte profile to replace what is lost in sweat as our original Hydration Sport Drink Mix, but without any added sugar. Designed for athletes who want to keep their fuel and hydration separate—or simply prefer a lighter-tasting option.  It’s hydration for when you’re thirsty and need electrolytes, a touch of real fruit flavor, and nothing more.

name: Upcycled Skratch Pouch
description_html: Were you looking to score one of these pouches?! This pouch is exclusive to the Loyalty Lab: Skratch Athlete Rewards. If you want to snag one sign up (it's free!) for the Loyalty Lab and start earning points for your purchases, following us on social, taking Skratch challenges (like cooking and working out Skratch style), and more! Once you have enough points you can cash in on the Loyalty reward page for a pouch!
